name: pounce
description: Codex-native dependency vetting and supply-chain guardrails for AI-assisted coding.

interface.shortDescription: Stop risky dependency installs before they land in a repo
interface.longDescription: Pounce turns dependency safety into an agent-native workflow for Codex with release vetting, workspace sweeps, and shell-time install guardrails.
defaultPrompt: Vet plain-crypto-js@4.2.1 before adding it to this project
Show the Pounce dashboard for this workspace
Sweep this repo for malicious package IOCs and install-time execution paths
Block risky Bash dependency installs and recommend an exact safer rewrite
